entries.raw_en:
ent-ClothingBeltUtilityEngineering = utility belt
    .desc = Can hold various things.

ent-ClothingBeltChiefEngineerFilled = chief engineer's toolbelt
    .desc = Holds tools, looks snazzy.

ent-ClothingBeltSecurityFilled = security belt
    .desc = Can hold security gear like handcuffs and flashes.

ent-ClothingBeltSecurityWebbingFilled = security carrier
    .desc = Unique and versatile chest rig, can hold security gear.

ent-ClothingBeltJanitorFilled = janibelt
    .desc = A belt used to hold most janitorial supplies.

ent-ClothingBeltMedicalFilled = medical belt
    .desc = Can hold various medical equipment.

ent-ClothingBeltMedicalEMTFilled = EMT belt
    .desc = Perfect for holding various equipment for medical emergencies.

ent-ClothingBeltPlantFilled = botanical belt
    .desc = A belt used to hold most hydroponics supplies. Suprisingly, not green.

ent-ClothingBeltSheathFilled = sabre sheath
    .desc = An ornate sheath designed to hold an officer's blade.

ent-ClothingBeltMilitaryWebbingMedFilled = medical chest rig
    .desc = A set of tactical webbing worn by Gorlex Marauder medic operatives.

ent-ClothingBeltWandFilled = wand belt
    .desc = A belt designed to hold various rods of power. A veritable fanny pack of exotic magic.

ent-ClothingBeltHolsterFilled = shoulder holster
    .desc = A holster to carry a handgun and ammo. WARNING: Badasses only.

ent-ClothingBeltChefFilled = chef belt
    .desc = A belt used to hold kitchen knives and condiments for quick access.

ent-BriefcaseBrownFilled = brown briefcase
    .desc = Useful for carrying items in your hands.

ent-BriefcaseSyndieSniperBundleFilled = brown briefcase
    .desc = Useful for carrying items in your hands.

ent-BriefcaseSyndieLobbyingBundleFilled = brown briefcase
    .desc = Useful for carrying items in your hands.

ent-BriefcaseThiefBribingBundleFilled = brown briefcase
    .desc = Useful for carrying items in your hands.

ent-MedkitFilled = first aid kit
    .desc = It's an emergency medical kit for those serious boo-boos.

ent-MedkitBurnFilled = burn treatment kit
    .desc = A specialized medical kit for when the toxins lab spontaneously burns down.

ent-MedkitBruteFilled = brute trauma treatment kit
    .desc = A first aid kit for when you get toolboxed.

ent-MedkitToxinFilled = toxin treatment kit
    .desc = Used to treat toxic blood content.

ent-MedkitOxygenFilled = oxygen deprivation treatment kit
    .desc = A box full of oxygen goodies.

ent-MedkitRadiationFilled = radiation treatment kit
    .desc = If you took your Rad-X you wouldn't need this.

ent-MedkitAdvancedFilled = advanced first aid kit
    .desc = An advanced kit to help deal with advanced wounds.

ent-MedkitCombatFilled = combat medical kit
    .desc = For the big weapons among us.

ent-StimkitFilled = first aid kit
    .desc = It's an emergency medical kit for those serious boo-boos.

ent-OxygenTankFilled = oxygen tank
    .desc = A standard cylindrical gas tank for oxygen. It can hold 5 L of gas.

ent-EmergencyOxygenTankFilled = emergency oxygen tank
    .desc = An easily portable tank for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen, rated for survival use only. It can hold 0.66 L of gas.

ent-EmergencyNitrogenTankFilled = emergency nitrogen tank
    .desc = An easily portable tank for emergencies. Contains very little nitrogen, rated for survival use only. It can hold 0.66 L of gas.

ent-ExtendedEmergencyOxygenTankFilled = extended-capacity emergency oxygen tank
    .desc = An emergency tank with extended capacity. Technically rated for prolonged use. It can hold 1.5 L of gas.

ent-ExtendedEmergencyNitrogenTankFilled = extended-capacity emergency nitrogen tank
    .desc = An emergency tank with extended capacity. Technically rated for prolonged use. It can hold 1.5 L of gas.

ent-DoubleEmergencyOxygenTankFilled = double emergency oxygen tank
    .desc = A high-grade dual-tank emergency life support container. It holds a decent amount of oxygen for its small size. It can hold 2.5 L of gas.

ent-DoubleEmergencyNitrogenTankFilled = double emergency nitrogen tank
    .desc = A high-grade dual-tank emergency life support container. It holds a decent amount of nitrogen for its small size. It can hold 2.5 L of gas.

ent-EmergencyFunnyOxygenTankFilled = funny emergency oxygen tank
    .desc = An easily portable tank for emergencies. Contains very little oxygen with an extra of funny gas, rated for survival use only. It can hold 0.66 L of gas.

ent-AirTankFilled = air tank
    .desc = Mixed anyone? It can hold 5 L of gas.

ent-ClothingShoesBootsMercFilled = mercenary boots
    .desc = Boots that have gone through many conflicts and that have proven their combat reliability.

ent-ClothingShoesBootsSyndieFilled = combat boots
    .desc = Robust combat boots for combat scenarios or combat situations. All combat, all the time.

ent-ToolboxSyndicateFilled = suspicious toolbox
    .desc = A sinister looking toolbox filled with elite syndicate tools.

ent-DresserCaptainFilled = dresser
    .desc = Wooden dresser, can store things inside itself, ideal for underwear, and someone's kidneys?...

ent-DresserChiefEngineerFilled = dresser
    .desc = Wooden dresser, can store things inside itself, ideal for underwear, and someone's kidneys?...

    .desc = Wooden dresser, can store things inside itself, ideal for underwear, and someone's kidneys?...

    .desc = Wooden dresser, can store things inside itself, ideal for underwear, and someone's kidneys?...

ent-DresserHeadOfSecurityFilled = dresser

ent-ClosetToolFilled = tool closet
    .desc = It's a storage unit for tools.

ent-LockerElectricalSuppliesFilled = electrical supplies locker
    .desc = A standard-issue Nanotrasen storage unit.

ent-LockerWeldingSuppliesFilled = welding supplies locker
    .desc = A standard-issue Nanotrasen storage unit.

ent-LockerAtmosphericsFilledHardsuit = atmospheric technician's locker
